verse_text: But a man who dies is utterly gone, And when a mortal has fallen, he is no more.

pericope.title: Eliphaz Exhorts Job to Be Strong

links.context: We labor that we may profit, but labor loses its meaning (see [[MAT.16:26]]) when it has no eternal purpose. From generation to generation, we inherit death ([[JOB.14:10]]). But Christ, the Sun of Righteousness (Mal 4:2), gives meaning to our labor and raises us up from death to life.

symbolic.title: Returning to the Garden of Eden
